title: Stick n' Stone
description: An addon for Simply Swords which adds Wood and Stone weapon variants.
body:
Stick n' Stone was made to add all wooden and stone variants of weapons added by Simply Swords. If you have any issues please come and join me in my [(incredibly new) Discord server](https://discord.gg/jYjxn9mtQa) for any mods I decide to make in the future. I might backport the mod, who knows...



### Required Mods

Simply Swords (Fabric 1.21.1)



I **HIGHLY RECOMMEND** you use Stick n' Stone with Better Combat to get the best out of all weapons.

Documentation on the mod (literally just the recipes) can be found at [moddedmc.wiki](https://moddedmc.wiki/en/project/stick-n-stone/docs).

Special Thanks and Credit
---

This mod would not have been possible without support from a few people:

- **Konsyliarz42** _- Created the Simply Swords - Vanilla Style resource pack which served as a baseline and reference for all textures._
 
- **Sweenuss/Sweeney** _- Creator of Simply Swords which allowed me to make this addon in the first place. Helped update the swords to include tooltip information._
 
- **Chronos_Sacaria** _- Co-Founder of Timefall Development and a huge helper for licensing and did actually inspire the name of Stick n' Stone._
 
- **Calcium_Drinker** _- Tester and Consumer of Calcium. Helped make sure everything worked as intended._
 

_**DISCLAIMER** - Whilst this mod is an addon for Simply Swords, it is not associated with Simply Swords or Timefall Development. I do not claim ownership of any original content within Simply Swords. All textures and models within Stick n' Stone are independent content._



**_IF YOU PLAN ON USING STICK N' STONE IN A MODPACK. PLEASE LEAVE A LINK TO THIS PAGE IN THE DESCRIPTION OF SAID MODPACK._**
